meaning: n.贸易,商业,交易,生意,职业,行业,[气]信风,顾客vi.交易,买卖,经商,对换,购物vt.用...进行交换
examples: Trade was very good last month.
Carpentry is a highly skilled trade.
The company will close 53 stores that trade as Threshers, Victoria Wine, Haddows and Bottoms Up.
The trade is a bad one for the Treasury, and a good one for you.
